name: Repository Intelligence
purpose: Discover self-describing cells and compile bounded, machine-readable context packets for autonomous agents.

interfaces.name: cell-catalog
interfaces.contract: npm run catalog emits a JSON catalog of every valid CELL.json or exits non-zero.

interfaces.name: agent-orientation
interfaces.contract: npm run orient -- --cell <id> or --path <path> emits a bounded orientation packet.

security.filesystem: Read-only repository traversal and metadata reads.
security.subprocesses: Runs read-only git log to summarize recent target-cell history.

extension_points: Add contract graph and cross-cell import analysis.
Add remote cell coordinates when the project later federates across repositories.
